title: deparia liangshanensis
intro: Deparia liangshanensis is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, also known as the lady fern. It is native to Sichuan and Yunnan provinces in China, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving immune function. Deparia liangshanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, coughs, and sore throats.
